name: 51_Devin_AI_Software_Engineer_Plants_Secret_Messages_in_Images
query: Hi! Please follow the instructions from the blog post [Hidden in Plain Sight](https://www.factsmachine.ai/p/hidden-in-plain-sight) to set up the script mentioned for generating images with hidden text in `src/visualize.py`. Ensure the generated images are of 1080p resolution and saved in `results/figures/`. Create control images embedding the text "FUTURE" and save it in `results/figures/`. Please also manually verify that the hidden text is indeed embedded in the generated images.

requirements.criteria: The instructions from the blog post [Hidden in Plain Sight](https://www.factsmachine.ai/p/hidden-in-plain-sight) are followed to set up the script mentioned for generating images with hidden text in `src/visualize.py`.
The generated images are ensured to be of "1080p" resolution and saved in `results/figures/`.
Control images embedding the text "FUTURE," is created and saved in `results/figures/`.

preferences.criteria: The system should be capable of learning and using unfamiliar technologies, adapting to new tools or platforms as required.
After reviewing the blog post, ControlNet should be successfully run on Modal to produce the images with the concealed messages for user.

judge_stats.criteria: The instructions from the blog post [Hidden in Plain Sight](https://www.factsmachine.ai/p/hidden-in-plain-sight) are followed to set up the script mentioned for generating images with hidden text in `src/visualize.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided `src/visualize.py` file contains only a minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging, with placeholder functions and a hardcoded list of keywords. It does not contain any code that follows the instructions from the referenced blog post for generating images with hidden text. The script lacks any image processing logic, text embedding routines, or references to the techniques described in the blog post. The execution history shows only a dependency installation issue, not a successful implementation of the required functionality.

judge_stats.criteria: The generated images are ensured to be of "1080p" resolution and saved in `results/figures/`.

reason:
<SATISFIED>
The trajectory evidence confirms that the script `scripts/generate_figures.py` was executed, generating images with a resolution of 1920x1080 (1080p) and saving them to `results/figures/`. A subsequent verification step confirmed all images in that directory have the required 1920x1080 pixel dimensions.

judge_stats.criteria: Control images embedding the text "FUTURE," is created and saved in `results/figures/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided evidence does not demonstrate that control images embedding the text "FUTURE" were created and saved in `results/figures/`. While the trajectory references a script execution that allegedly generated such images, the actual project structure shows that the `results/figures/` directory exists but is empty, and the only source file present is `src/visualize.py`. There is no concrete evidence—such as generated image files listed in the workspace structure, code from the generation script, or output samples—to verify that the images were successfully created and saved to the specified location.
